title: Switch node fails to match 'starts with' or 'contains' conditions
symptom: The Switch node always sends items to the Fallback output, even when the input matches the defined conditions. This occurs with both 'starts with' and 'contains' rules.
not_this_if: Input does not match the expected string format
Switch node is configured correctly with expressions
root_cause: The Switch node requires the field to be set as an expression for proper evaluation. If the field is not formatted as an expression, it will not correctly compare the input string against the conditions, leading to incorrect routing.
fix_steps: Ensure the field is set as an expression
Save the workflow and execute it again
agent_instruction: Update the Switch node to use '{{ $json.url }}' as the field expression.
